option.name: --backup
tip: make a backup of each existing destination file

option.name: --interactive
tip: prompt whether to remove existing destination files

option.name: --logical
tip: follow TARGETs that are symbolic links

option.name: --no-dereference
tip: treat LINK_NAME as a normal file if it is a symbolic link to a directory

option.name: --no-target-directory
tip: treat LINK_NAME as a normal file always

option.name: --physical
tip: make hard links directly to symbolic links

option.name: --relative
tip: create symbolic links relative to link location

option.name: --symbolic
tip: make symbolic links instead of hard links

option.name: --target-directory
tip: specify the DIRECTORY in which to create the links

option.name: --verbose
tip: print name of each linked file

option.name: -b
tip: like --backup but does not accept an argument
